nasb.text: Each will be like a refuge from the wind And a shelter from the storm, Like streams of water in a dry country, Like the shade of a huge rock in a parched land.

esv.text: Each will be like a hiding place from the wind, a shelter from the storm, like streams of water in a dry place, like the shade of a great rock in a weary land.

cnv.text: 必有一人像避風所， 和避暴雨的隱密處， 像乾旱之地的溪水， 又像疲乏之地的大磐石的陰影。

ccb.text: 每人都像躲避狂风暴雨的庇护所， 如荒漠中的溪流， 又似干旱之地遮荫的大磐石。

csbs.text: 个个都像避风所和避暴雨的隐秘处， 又像荒漠中的溪水， 像干旱之地大磐石的荫庇。
